title: Redis "This instance has cluster support disabled" error?
body: I'm using WSL. I installed Redis through apt-get, built it from source, and installed it from a PPA. In all 3 cases, I get This instance has cluster support disabled. I have cluster-enabled yes in the config file. I restarted everything. How do I enable cluster support?

answers.body: I think in addition to setting cluster-enabled to yes you have to actually configure a cluster. See the Redis cluster tutorial, specifically the section "Creating the cluster"
